who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, inefficient conversion of timesheets causes late payroll submissions. We automate the transformation instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inefficient conversion of timesheets to payroll reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers forum discussions on payroll processes
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Join community groups for HR managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and basic report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Set default reminders for payroll deadlines
Allow CSV import for existing timesheet data
Enable one-click export of payroll reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
